emotional_arc:
From tension to a sense of new purpose and protective resolve.

- Close-up on the trio to emphasize their new unit.

storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH010_SC005

## Production Intent
Establish the new status of john_carter as a chieftain-level figure by transitioning him from the interior tension of the audience chamber to the expansive scale of the Thark city streets. The sequence must visually cement the trio (john_carter, dejah_thoris, and woola) as a unified, protective unit moving through the environment with newfound purpose.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- dejah_thoris
- woola

## Required Environments
- Exit of the audience chamber / Thark city streets

## Continuity Constraints
- Character movement direction (exit trajectory)
- Lighting transitions from interior to exterior

## Beat List
- BT001: john_carter, dejah_thoris, and woola exit the audience chamber.
- BT002: The group moves through the transition from interior lighting to the Thark city streets.
- BT003: The trio establishes their new unit/purpose as they navigate the scale of the environment.
